title: hieracium bifidum subsp. coriifolium
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. coriifolium is a plant species, also known as Hawkweed, that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. coriifolium include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Hieracium bifidum subsp. coriifolium is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
